content_fingerprint: hugging face gradio spaces now self describe for ai agents via agents md endpoint every gradio space now automatically serves a machine readable agents md endpoint letting ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi discover and use spaces without manual configuration hugging face has added a self describing interface to its gradio spaces platform every space now automatically serves an agents md endpoint that ai agents can read on their own the changelog entry posted april 17 describes the endpoint as a machine readable api description designed to let coding agents interact with spaces dir
